description: The 'Ndrina Gaglianesi is a 'Ndrangheta clan based in Catanzaro, Italy. It is involved in organized crime activities typical of the 'Ndrangheta. The clan has a structured hierarchy with several capibastone (bosses) overseeing different neighborhoods of Catanzaro. Notable members include Tommaso Mazza, who became a pentito (collaborator) in 1994.
